name: Сводная инвентаризация ПК
query: SELECT 'Система' AS section, 'Имя хоста' AS parameter, COALESCE(hostname, '') AS value, COALESCE(computer_name, '') AS details FROM system_info UNION ALL SELECT 'Система', 'UUID устройства', COALESCE(uuid, ''), COALESCE(hardware_serial, '') FROM system_info UNION ALL SELECT 'Система', 'Модель ПК', COALESCE(hardware_vendor, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(hardware_model, ''), COALESCE(hardware_version, '') FROM system_info UNION ALL SELECT 'Операционная система', 'Версия ОС', COALESCE(name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(version, ''), 'build=' || COALESCE(build, '') || '; platform=' || COALESCE(platform, '') || '; install_date=' || COALESCE(install_date, '') FROM os_version UNION ALL SELECT 'Железо', 'Процессор', COALESCE(model, ''), 'manufacturer=' || COALESCE(manufacturer, '') || '; cores=' || COALESCE(CAST(number_of_cores AS TEXT), '') || '; logical=' || COALESCE(CAST(logical_processors AS TEXT), '') || '; max_clock=' || COALESCE(CAST(max_clock_speed AS TEXT), '') FROM cpu_info UNION ALL SELECT 'Железо', 'Оперативная память', COALESCE(device_locator, ''), 'bank=' || COALESCE(bank_locator, '') || '; manufacturer=' || COALESCE(manufacturer, '') || '; size_mb=' || COALESCE(CAST(size AS TEXT), '') || '; serial=' || COALESCE(serial_number, '') || '; speed=' || COALESCE(CAST(configured_clock_speed AS TEXT), '') FROM memory_devices UNION ALL SELECT 'Железо', 'Физический диск', COALESCE(hardware_model, name, ''), 'serial=' || COALESCE(serial, '') || '; size=' || COALESCE(CAST(disk_size AS TEXT), '') || '; type=' || COALESCE(type, '') || '; manufacturer=' || COALESCE(manufacturer, '') FROM disk_info UNION ALL SELECT 'Железо', 'Логический диск', COALESCE(device_id, ''), 'filesystem=' || COALESCE(file_system, '') || '; size=' || COALESCE(CAST(size AS TEXT), '') || '; free=' || COALESCE(CAST(free_space AS TEXT), '') || '; boot=' || COALESCE(CAST(boot_partition AS TEXT), '') FROM logical_drives UNION ALL SELECT 'ПО', 'Установленная программа', COALESCE(name, ''), 'version=' || COALESCE(version, '') || '; publisher=' || COALESCE(publisher, '') || '; install_date=' || COALESCE(install_date, '') || '; location=' || COALESCE(install_location, '') FROM programs WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' UNION ALL SELECT 'Сеть', 'Сетевой интерфейс', COALESCE(interface, ''), 'friendly_name=' || COALESCE(friendly_name, '') || '; mac=' || COALESCE(mac, '') || '; status=' || COALESCE(connection_status, '') || '; dhcp=' || COALESCE(CAST(dhcp_enabled AS TEXT), '') || '; dns=' || COALESCE(dns_server_search_order, '') || '; speed=' || COALESCE(CAST(link_speed AS TEXT), '') FROM interface_details UNION ALL SELECT 'Сеть', 'IP-адрес', COALESCE(address, ''), 'interface=' || COALESCE(interface, '') || '; name=' || COALESCE(friendly_name, '') || '; mask=' || COALESCE(mask, '') || '; type=' || COALESCE(type, '') FROM interface_addresses WHERE address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0') UNION ALL SELECT 'Сеть', 'Маршрут', COALESCE(destination, ''), 'gateway=' || COALESCE(gateway, '') || '; source=' || COALESCE(source, '') || '; interface=' || COALESCE(interface, '') || '; metric=' || COALESCE(CAST(metric AS TEXT), '') || '; type=' || COALESCE(type, '') FROM routes UNION ALL SELECT 'Сеть', 'Открытый порт', COALESCE(lp.address, '') || ':' || COALESCE(CAST(lp.port AS TEXT), ''), 'protocol=' || COALESCE(CAST(lp.protocol AS TEXT), '') || '; family=' || COALESCE(CAST(lp.family AS TEXT), '') || '; pid=' || COALESCE(CAST(lp.pid AS TEXT), '') || '; process=' || COALESCE(p.name, '') || '; path=' || COALESCE(p.path, '') FROM listening_ports lp LEFT JOIN processes p ON lp.pid = p.pid WHERE lp.port != 0;
description: Демонстрационный сводный запрос для защиты диплома. Собирает основные сведения о ПК: систему и ОС, процессор, оперативную память, диски, установленное ПО, сетевые интерфейсы, IP-адреса, маршруты и открытые порты. Результат возвращается в универсальном виде: раздел, параметр, значение и детали.
